description_long: This object is a set of four screwdrivers, each with a long, slender metal shaft and a contoured handle. The handles are ergonomically shaped, featuring a combination of black and white materials that likely provide both grip and comfort. The shafts are metallic and straight, extending from the handle to a pointed tip, which appears to be of the Phillips type. The handles have a hole at the base, possibly for hanging or storage. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or urban maintenance settings. No visible branding or wear is present, and the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
description: A set of four modern screwdrivers with contoured black and white handles and metallic Phillips tips, designed for ergonomic grip and precision.
description_view_0: Four screwdrivers are shown from the front, displaying their contoured handles and varying shaft lengths.
description_view_1: The screwdrivers are viewed from above, highlighting the slim profile of the shafts and the alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: The set is shown from the back, revealing the opposite side of the handles and the full length of the shafts.
description_view_3: A top-down view of the screwdrivers, emphasizing the handle shapes and the straight alignment of the shafts.
attribute_handle_type: contoured, plastic and rubberized handle with ergonomic grip features and a two-tone black and white color scheme
